title: amaranthus × braunii
intro: Amaranthus × braunii is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Amaranthus albus and Amaranthus retroflexus, belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Amaranthus × braunii include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Amaranthus × braunii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its seeds and leaves can be used in herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures.
